description: Agent-org session discipline for Grok: org-lane-mark marks sessions that dispatch Solo workers or arm timers (PreToolUse on solo MCP spawn/timer tools); org-conduct-refresh runs at BOTH ends of a session's life, priming the role-skill contract on SessionStart startup|resume (a Solo-managed process is an org lane, and a role that never invoked its skill is not running under it) and re-injecting the re-read order on the compact matcher, since summaries keep facts not conduct; org-stop-gate blocks a marked session's first Stop with anti-idle checklist. All inert if never spawned workers. Commands use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time substitution (nested ${VAR:-default} expands empty against process env).
